hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -q 'docker-compose\.yml$' && docker compose -f "$f" config --quiet 2>&1 | tail -3; } 2>/dev/null || true

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.github/workflows/.*\.yml$' && python3 -c "import yaml; yaml.safe_load(open('$f'))" 2>&1 && echo "Workflow YAML valid: $f"; } 2>/dev/null || true
